case_title: AARON B. SEIVERTSON VS. MOHAMMED REZA GHANBARI et al

docket_entries.description: REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR NOV-18-2010 AND JURY TRIAL CALENDAR SET FOR DEC-06-2010 ARE ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY THE COURT. MATTER HERETOFORE SET ON NOV-09-2010 FOR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE CRC 3.1385. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

NOTICE OF MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ON NOV-18-2010 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 505. NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR DEC-06-2010 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON MAY-14-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR NOV-09-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. SEP-22-2010 MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
